name: Cirkal Financial Services, LLC
description_short: Cirkal Financial Services is a veteran-owned financial education and advisory firm offering free consultations and comprehensive financial planning across all 50 states, partnering with 150+ A-rated financial institutions.
description_long:
Cirkal Financial Services, LLC is a 100% veteran-owned and operated financial services firm based in San Antonio, Texas. Founded with a mission to help families, individuals, and businesses build better financial futures, the company positions itself as an educational resource rather than a direct lender or credit repair service. The firm operates as a financial advisory and coaching agency that connects clients with vetted third-party financial products and services.

The company offers comprehensive financial education and advisory services including financial needs analysis, retirement planning, education funding, estate planning, debt reduction strategies, and insurance planning. They provide both individual consultations and group financial education sessions (typically for groups of 10 or more). All initial consultations and financial plans are offered free of charge. Clients can schedule appointments online via Calendly or call their San Antonio headquarters at (888) 489-3418. The company serves clients both in-person and virtually across all 50 states.

Circkal distinguishes itself through its veteran ownership, A+ BBB accreditation, and network approach rather than direct product issuance. They emphasize a comprehensive, education-first methodology and claim to provide unbiased recommendations aligned with client risk tolerance. The company advertises a collaborative relationship model where they educate clients on available strategies and help them partner with external A-rated providers from their network of 150+ financial institutions.

As a free-help financial advisory firm, Cirkal's primary value lies in financial education and guidance rather than direct financial products or credit repair services. Potential clients should understand that while consultations are free, the company ultimately facilitates connections to partner financial institutions for actual product implementation. The company's website content is somewhat sparse on specific service details, credentials of individual advisors, and detailed case studies, which limits the ability to fully assess service quality and specialization.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial consultation and financial plan
Serves all 50 states with both in-person and virtual options
Network of 150+ A-rated financial institution partners
Offers group financial education sessions for organizations
Wide range of service areas including estate planning, retirement, debt reduction, and insurance planning
cons: Website contains multiple grammatical errors and appears incomplete (truncated content on services page)
Limited information about individual advisor credentials, certifications, or licensing
No detailed case studies or specific success metrics provided on website
Business model relies on third-party providers, so clients are not getting direct financial services
Countdown timer and incomplete sections suggest website may be under construction or poorly maintained
best_for: Individuals seeking free financial education and guidance before working with external providers
Small business owners and families interested in comprehensive financial planning services
Organizations (10+ people) wanting in-person or virtual group financial education sessions
Veterans and military-connected individuals preferring to work with veteran-owned financial services
diagnosis: Cirkal Financial Services is best for individuals and families seeking free financial education and comprehensive planning guidance from a veteran-owned firm. The main caveat is that they function as an advisory intermediary connecting clients to third-party providers rather than offering direct financial products or credit repair services themselves, so consumers should view them as educators and referral sources rather than direct service providers.
services: Estate and legacy planning (living wills, trusts, testaments)
Referral to A-rated financial institution partners
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 500 Navarro St Rm 283, San Antonio, TX 78205
